# Olga Heleno Walker

> MBACP integrative child and adolescent psychotherapist working with children, young people and families across York, Harrogate and North Yorkshire.

## About

Olga Heleno Walker is an MBACP-registered integrative child and adolescent psychotherapist based in North Yorkshire, working with children, young people and families across York and Harrogate. She helps children and teenagers make sense of difficult feelings and experiences — anxiety, low mood, anger, loss, family change, friendships and self-esteem — in a space that feels safe, unhurried and free of judgement.

Olga trained through Place2Be, one of the UK's leading children's mental health charities, completing a Level 7 Postgraduate Diploma in Counselling and Psychotherapy for Children and Young People. She currently works as a school counsellor at St Aidan's Church of England High School in Harrogate, and has supported pupils across both primary (ages 4–11) and secondary (ages 11–18) settings. Her practice is informed by mindfulness-based training with the Oxford Mindfulness Foundation.

Before retraining as a psychotherapist, Olga spent over a decade in people and consultancy roles. She is fluent in Portuguese.

## Who she works with

- Children (from around age 4) and adolescents (up to 18)
- Families seeking support for a child or young person

## Areas she works with

- Anxiety and worry
- Low mood
- Anger and frustration
- Bereavement and loss
- Family change
- Friendships
- Self-esteem
- School-related worries
- Emotional regulation

## Approach

- Led by the child — follows the young person's lead through talk, play and creativity, meeting them where they are.
- Integrative, not one-size-fits-all — draws on a range of therapeutic approaches tailored to the individual, their age and what they bring.
- Safe, consistent and confidential — offers a reliable, non-judgemental relationship and works alongside parents, carers and schools where it helps.

## Qualifications & Membership

- Registered Member, BACP (MBACP) — bound by the BACP Ethical Framework
- Level 7 Postgraduate Diploma in Counselling and Psychotherapy for Children and Young People — Place2Be
- Level 3 Certificate in Counselling Skills for Working with Children — Place2Be
- Level 2 Award in Counselling Skills for Working with Children — Place2Be
- Mindfulness-Based Cognitive Therapy (MBCT) — The Oxford Mindfulness Foundation
- University of East London
- MLitt, Middle East Security (Distinction) — University of Aberdeen

## Training & Experience

- 2025–present: School Counsellor — St Aidan's Church of England High School, Harrogate
- 2023–2025: Level 7 Postgraduate Diploma in Counselling & Psychotherapy for Children & Young People — Place2Be
- 2023–2025: School Counsellor — AIM Academies Trust (primary and secondary)
- 2022: Level 3 Certificate & Level 2 Award in Counselling Skills for Working with Children — Place2Be
- 2018–2021: Head of People — Expert Edge (now Havas Market)
- 2011–2014: Senior Auditor — JPMorgan Chase & Co.
- 2009–2011: Strategy Analyst & Risk Assurance Manager — Lloyds Banking Group
- 2004–2009: Research Associate to Senior Strategy Analyst — Corporate Executive Board (now Gartner)

## Location

- York, North Yorkshire
- Harrogate, North Yorkshire

## Links

- Website: https://olgahelenowalker.com/
